payload.title: Local UI as a full client of its bound remote (collab unlocks on connect)
payload.description: Today invites/members/presence/keys are gated on meta.hosted (true only when the server IS the hosted hub), so a local `scope serve` bound to a remote syncs data but shows no collaboration UI — you must context-switch to the hosted web UI to invite people. Make the LOCAL UI a full client of its bound remote: when connected (remote.json + an API key), the local server PROXIES the collaboration endpoints to the remote (key stays server-side) and the web UI lights up Members & sharing, invites, and presence for the bound project. Connecting becomes a button in the app, so binding needs no CLI. Builds on SCP-185 (collab API), SCP-218 (sync), SCP-227 (invite UX).
